zh.lifeSummary: 當Wenzel I von Luxemburg於1337年2月25日出生在捷克普拉哈時，他的父親Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême40歲，母親Béatrice de BOURBON18歲。他於1352年3月13日與Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou在比利時布拉班特布波瑟爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1383年12月7日在盧森堡盧布格盧布格 希迪盧布格 希迪享年46歲，埋葬在比利時盧布格福洛倫維爾維勒斯-德凡吉瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wenzel I von Luxemburg于1337年2月25日出生在捷克普拉哈时，他的父亲Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême40岁，母亲Béatrice de BOURBON18岁。他于1352年3月13日与Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou在比利时布拉班特布波瑟爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1383年12月7日在卢森堡盧布格盧布格 希迪盧布格 希迪享年46岁，埋葬在比利时盧布格福洛倫維爾維勒斯-德凡吉瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Wenzel I von Luxemburg was born on 25 February 1337, in Prague, Czechia, his father, Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême, was 40 and his mother, Béatrice de BOURBON, was 18. He married Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou on 13 March 1352, in Brussels, Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 7 December 1383, in Luxembourg City, Luxembourg City, Luxembourg, Luxembourg, at the age of 46, and was buried in Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxembourg, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wenzel I von Luxemburg est né le 25 février 1337, à Prague, République tchèque, son père, Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de BOURBON, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou le 13 mars 1352, à Bruxelles, Brabant, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1383, à Luxembourg City, Luxembourg City, Luxembourg, Luxembourg, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxembourg, Belgique.

de.Luxembourg City, Lëtzebuerg, Luxembourg,: Luxembourg City, Luxembourg City, Luxembourg, Luxemburg
de.lifeSummary: Als Wenzel I von Luxemburg am 25. Februar 1337 in Prag, Tschechien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême 40 und seine Mutter Béatrice de BOURBON 18. Er hat am 13. März 1352 in Brüssel, Brabant, Belgien Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1383 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Luxembourg City, Luxembourg City, Luxembourg, Luxemburg und wurde in Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxemburg, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wenzel I von Luxemburg è nato il il 25 febbraio 1337 nel Praga, Cechia, il suo padre, Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de BOURBON, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou il 13 marzo 1352, nel Brussel, Brabante, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 7 dicembre 1383, nel Luxembourg City, Luxembourg City, Luxembourg, Lussemburgo, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Lussemburgo, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Wenzel I von Luxemburgが1337年2月25日にチェコプラハで生まれた時，父Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohêmeは40歳，母Béatrice de BOURBONは18歳であった。1352年3月13日にベルギーブラバントブルセルでJeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbouと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1383年12月7日にルクセンブルクルクセンボウルグルクセンボウルグ シトイルクセンボウルグ シトイで46歳で死去し，ベルギールクセンボウルグフロアンヴィルヴィラース-デヴァント-オルヴァルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Wenzel I von Luxemburg(이)가 1337년 2월 25일 체코 프라하에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de BOURBON(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1352년 3월 13일 벨기에 브라반트 브루셀에서 Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1383년 12월 7일 룩셈부르크 루세보우르그 루세보우르그 시티 루세보우르그 시티에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 루세보우르그 플로렌빌 비레르스-데베아트-르발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wenzel I von Luxemburg nasceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1337, em Praha, Chequia, seu pai, Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de BOURBON, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou em 13 de março de 1352, em Bruxelas, Brabante, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1383, em Luxembourg City, Luxembourg City, Luxembourg, Luxemburgo, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Villers-devant-Orval, Florenville, Luxemburgo, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wenzel I von Luxemburg родился 25 февраля 1337 г. в местности Прага, Чехия, его отцу по имени Jean I de Luxembourg Roi de Bohême было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de BOURBON, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Brabant Duchess of Brabant and Limbou 13 марта 1352 г. в местности брассел, брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 7 декабря 1383 г. в местности луксембург сити, луксембург сити, луксембург, Люксембург в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности виллирс-девант-орваль, флоренвилл, луксембург, Бельгия.
